content.sentence_text: He opened the 'd'oor carefully a few minutes ago.
The lorry 'd'river cleaned his dirty gloves this morning.
They checked the spee'd' of the car regularly last month.
The roa'd' is wet after the heavy rain yesterday evening.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen to each question, use the pause to answer it, then compare your response with the model answer.
සෑම ප්‍රශ්නයකටම සවන් දෙන්න, පිළිතුරු දීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு கேள்வியையும் கேட்டு, இடைவெளியைப் பயன்படுத்தி பதிலளியுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலை மாதிரி பதிலுடன் ஒப்பிடுங்கள்.

tables: I play the piano every day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?
dialogues.text_b: We waited at the service centre all day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?

activity_a.text:
Put the words in the correct order. The first word in each sentence is in bold.
වචන නිවැරදි අනුපිළිවෙලට තබන්න. සෑම වාක්‍යයකම පළමු වචනය තද අකුරින් ලියවා ඇත.
சொற்களை சரியான வரிசையில் வைக்கவும். ஒவ்வொரு வாக்கியத்திலும் முதல் வார்த்தை திட எழுத்தில் உள்ளது.

content.sentence: She painted the old service trolley yesterday.
He opened the workshop shutter last Wednesday.
They washed the dusty windshields yesterday morning.
I collected the spare parts last Tuesday.
We repaired the broken jack last month.
She finished the inspection checklist yesterday afternoon.
He started the automotive training course.
They placed safety cones along the driveway.
I cleaned the testing bay yesterday.
We mailed the service reports last Friday.

பதிவை கேட்டு, சொற்களை படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_b.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_c.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

Questions.question: Why was the alternator tester making a strange sound?
options: The drive belt was very loose.

Questions.question: Why is the tool cabinet door not closing properly?
What problem did the storage rack have?
Questions.answer: It was unstable and a screw was missing.
options: It was unstable because all the screws were missing.
It was unstable and a screw was missing.

Questions.question: Why is the compressor display still unclear?
Questions.answer: The display bulb might be failing.
options: The display bulb might be failing.
The display bulb might be broken.

Questions.question: Why was the tyre inflator shaking?

activity_c.text: Good morning, sir. The workshop floor is a bit noisy today.
I think the alternator testing unit is making a strange whirring sound.
Morning, Kasun. I’ve been checking the machines since early morning.
When I checked that tester, the drive belt was a little loose.
I tightened it, but it is still making a light vibration.
I also noticed the tool cabinet yesterday.
It was fine, but today the main door hinge is bent and it is not closing properly.
Yes, one of the hinges was bent.
I adjusted it, but we might need to replace the whole hinge later.
Can you also look at the storage rack?
The trainees cleaned it last evening, but this morning it looked unstable on the right side.
I inspected it.
One support screw was missing, so I added a new one.
But the frame was unstable for a long time.
We might need a new rack.
Another issue, the air compressor temperature display was blurry last night.
We cleaned the panel, but the numbers are still unclear.
I tested the wiring.
Everything was fine, but the display bulb might be failing.
I ordered a replacement.
Good. This morning the tyre inflator was shaking badly.
When I opened the cover, the motor was dusty.
Yes, the motor was dusty, so I cleaned it.
But I will inspect the bearings after tea.
Thank you, sir. We can’t continue the servicing until everything is stable.
No problem, Kasun. I’ll finish all remaining checks before 11 a.m.

We cleaned the panel, but the numbers are still unclear.
Everything was fine, but the display bulb might be failing.
Good. This morning the tyre inflator was shaking badly.
When I opened the cover, the motor was dusty.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම පියවරන් ඔබට මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට උදව් කරනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
